allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\xampp\\htdocs\\carrental" -Depth 2 | Where-Object { $_.PSIsContainer -or $_.Extension -in @\('.php', '.html', '.sql', '.js', '.css'\) } | Select-Object -Property Name, FullName | Sort-Object FullName)

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -e "USE carrental; ALTER TABLE tblvehicles ADD COLUMN TransmissionType varchar\(50\) DEFAULT 'Automatico' AFTER SeatingCapacity; UPDATE tblvehicles SET VehiclesBrand = 7 WHERE id = 7; UPDATE tblvehicles SET VehiclesBrand = 5 WHERE id = 8; UPDATE tblvehicles SET TransmissionType = 'Automatico' WHERE id IN \(1, 2, 5, 6, 7, 8\); UPDATE tblvehicles SET TransmissionType = 'Manual' WHERE id = 4; UPDATE tblvehicles SET TransmissionType = 'Automatico' WHERE id = 3; SELECT id, VehiclesTitle, VehiclesBrand, TransmissionType FROM tblvehicles ORDER BY id;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -e "USE carrental; SELECT id, VehiclesTitle, VehiclesBrand, TransmissionType, PricePerDay FROM tblvehicles ORDER BY id;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -e "USE carrental; ALTER TABLE tblbooking ADD COLUMN GuestName varchar\(120\) DEFAULT NULL AFTER userEmail; DESCRIBE tblbooking;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -e "USE carrental; UPDATE tblfeatures SET Subtitle='Acumulamos puntos en cada reserva para brindarte beneficios exclusivos y atencion preferencial.' WHERE id=1; UPDATE tblfeatures SET Title='Elija su vehiculo', Subtitle='Selecciona entre nuestra amplia flota el vehiculo que mejor se adapte a tus necesidades y presupuesto.' WHERE id=2; UPDATE tblfeatures SET Subtitle='Canjea tus puntos por descuentos, upgrades y beneficios especiales en tu proxima renta.' WHERE id=3; SELECT id, Icon, Title, Subtitle FROM tblfeatures;" 2>&1)
